events.event_description: Commercial Agent John B. Williams appointed first Consul to the Fiji Islands, resident at Auckland, New Zealand — not resident in Fiji.

evidence.quote: Commercial Agent John B. Williams was appointed the first Consul to the Fiji Islands on August 19, 1844. He was resident at Auckland, New Zealand.

events.event_description: American Embassy at Suva established, with Robert W. Skiff as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy at Suva established on November 1, 1971, with Robert W. Skiff as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
